prompt: Ultra-detailed, hyperrealistic 8k cinematic fashion portrait of a stylish young man in his late 20s with a neatly groomed black beard, shown in 3 poses on glossy rain-washed streets. In the first, he sits casually on a low barrier, leaning back with cool composure, neon reflections glowing in puddles. In the second, he walks with effortless swagger across wet pavement, his silhouette mirrored in the glossy surface. In the third, he crouches low with elbows on knees, exuding relaxed urban confidence. He wears an oversized black graphic t-shirt, baggy joggers, and crisp white sneakers, radiating streetwear minimalism. The cinematic city glows with neon lights, graffiti walls, and dynamic bokeh. Shot on an 85mm f/1.4 lens with shallow depth, soft diffused lighting, and rim highlights, the moody palette makes his outfit blaze vividly against the atmospheric backdrop.
promptEn: Ultra-detailed, hyperrealistic 8k cinematic fashion portrait of a stylish young man in his late 20s with a neatly groomed black beard, shown in 3 poses on glossy rain-washed streets. In the first, he sits casually on a low barrier, leaning back with cool composure, neon reflections glowing in puddles. In the second, he walks with effortless swagger across wet pavement, his silhouette mirrored in the glossy surface. In the third, he crouches low with elbows on knees, exuding relaxed urban confidence. He wears an oversized black graphic t-shirt, baggy joggers, and crisp white sneakers, radiating streetwear minimalism. The cinematic city glows with neon lights, graffiti walls, and dynamic bokeh. Shot on an 85mm f/1.4 lens with shallow depth, soft diffused lighting, and rim highlights, the moody palette makes his outfit blaze vividly against the atmospheric backdrop.
promptZh: 超精细、超写实 8k 电影感时尚人像，主角为 一位 20 多岁、留着整洁黑色胡须的时尚青年，以 3 种姿态呈现于 光泽感十足的雨后街道。第一种姿态，他随意地坐在低矮的护栏上，向后倚靠，神情从容冷峻，霓虹灯影在水洼中闪烁。第二种姿态，他迈着轻松的步伐走在湿漉漉的路面上，身影倒映在光亮的地表。第三种姿态，他低身蹲下，双肘撑在膝盖上，散发出随性的都市自信。他身着 一件超大款黑色印花 T 恤、宽松慢跑裤和干净的白色运动鞋，彰显街头极简主义风格。电影般的城市闪烁着霓虹灯光，背景是涂鸦墙和动态的虚化效果。使用 85mm f/1.4 镜头拍摄，具有浅景深、柔和的漫射光和轮廓光，忧郁的色调使他的穿搭在充满氛围感的背景下显得格外鲜明。
